name: Service Account Anomaly Audit
description: Detects anomalous service account activity including unusual login times, new source IPs, or permission changes. Uses AI to analyze the anomaly context, checks current permissions against baseline, alerts the service account owner, and creates a tracking ticket if unauthorized changes are found.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Query service account permissions and group memberships

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tracking ticket for unauthorized service account changes

data.title: Service Account Anomaly Alert
data.summary: Fires on service account anomaly or unusual authentication pattern

data.title: AI Service Account Analysis
data.summary: Analyze anomaly against service account behavioral baseline

data.title: Check Permissions vs Baseline
data.summary: Compare current service account permissions against stored baseline

config.code:
current_perms = set(context['trigger']['alert'].get('current_permissions', []))
baseline_perms = set(context['trigger']['alert'].get('baseline_permissions', []))
added = list(current_perms - baseline_perms)
removed = list(baseline_perms - current_perms)
result = {'permissions_changed': len(added) > 0 or len(removed) > 0, 'added_permissions': added, 'removed_permissions': removed}

data.title: Permissions Changed?
data.summary: Branch if service account permissions deviate from baseline

data.title: Alert Service Account Owner
data.summary: Notify the service account owner of unauthorized permission changes

config.message: Unauthorized permission changes detected on service account {{$.trigger.alert.service_account_name}}. Added: {{$.nodes.sa-3.result.added_permissions}}. Removed: {{$.nodes.sa-3.result.removed_permissions}}. Please review immediately.

data.title: Create Audit Ticket
data.summary: Create Jira ticket to track service account permission investigation

config.title: Service Account Audit: {{$.trigger.alert.service_account_name}} — Permission Deviation
config.description: Service account {{$.trigger.alert.service_account_name}} has permission changes deviating from baseline. Added permissions: {{$.nodes.sa-3.result.added_permissions}}. Investigation required.

data.title: Log Anomaly Note
data.summary: Log the anomaly as informational — no permission drift detected

config.note: Service account anomaly reviewed. Permissions match baseline. Behavioral anomaly logged for trending analysis.

config.summary: Service account anomaly audit actions completed
